title: Molde, Møre og Romsdal — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Molde, Møre og Romsdal: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Molde is a city in Møre og Romsdal with a population of 32,000. The City of Roses, with panoramic views of the Moldefjord and the iconic Molde panorama of 222 mountain peaks.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
